'''Argovia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of stormy, [[Water/Legends|misty]], marshy wetlands in the [[Endocray sector/Legends|Endocray sector]], rich in [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]] and [[Ore/Legends|ores]]. It was the location of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Sensor Net Complex|sensor network complex]] that analyzed data from thousands of sensor buoys, ships, and [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. To protect both the sensor complex and the valuable ore, the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] companies and the Empire mutually restricted any non-personnel from immigrating to the planet.<ref name="Strike" />

{{Planet-stub}}
